generated_code:
from flask import Flask, request
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.post("/upload")
def upload():
    '''
    Reads the XML from the incoming request.
    Parse it and return.
    '''
    data = request.get_data(as_text=True)
    # Use a secure parser that does not resolve external entities (prevents XXE/CWE-776 and CWE-668)
    parser = ET.XMLParser(resolve_entities=False)
    root = ET.fromstring(data, parser=parser)
    return ET.tostring(root, encoding='unicode')

codeql_results.message: XML parsing depends on a [user-provided value](1) without guarding against uncontrolled entity expansion.

findings.cwe_name: Improper Restriction of Recursive Entity Expansion in XML Processing
findings.description: XML parsing depends on user-provided values without guarding against uncontrolled entity expansion. CodeQL detected this at line 16.
findings.remediation_description: Ensure XML parser explicitly disables entity resolution and network access

healing_failures.root_cause: CodeQL still detects uncontrolled entity expansion despite secure parser configuration

report.recommendation: Fix suspected XML parsing vulnerability (CWE-776) by ensuring XML parser configuration fully prevents entity expansion. Verify secure XML parsing implementation.

patch_feedback.priority: Fix suspected issues first, then validate secure XML parsing implementation
